def negative_cors_allow_all_origins_set_without_production_environment_check():
    rule_id = "cors_allow_all_origins_set_without_production_environment_check"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "CORS configuration allows all origins (*) without a conditional check for the production environment."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
